sections.markdown:
- Activity: Afternoon Run
- Started: 2025-10-06 17:41
- Distance: 10.4 km
- Moving time: 56:14
- Elapsed time: 56:18
- Elevation gain: 190.6 m
- Average heart rate: 172.9 bpm
- Max heart rate: 186 bpm
- Average watts: 230.5 W
- Average speed: 11.1 km/h

- Apple Health recorded `4` during-run heart-rate samples. Average HR was `172.8 bpm`, ranging from `163.3` to `177.7 bpm`.
- First-half average HR was `169.3 bpm` and second-half average HR was `176.3 bpm` (+7.0 bpm), which shows a modest late rise in aerobic cost.

- Apple Health cadence averaged `179.9 spm`, with a working range of `160.0` to `185.4 spm` after excluding `1` start-stop outlier below `100 spm`.
- First-half cadence averaged `180.6 spm` and second-half cadence averaged `179.5 spm` (-1.1 spm), which looks mechanically stable.

- Strava moving pace averaged `5:25 /km` across `10.377 km` in `56:14` moving time.
- Estimated first-half moving pace was `5:23 /km` and second-half pace was `5:28 /km` (+5 s/km), so pace stayed broadly even.

- Strava summary HR came in at `172.9 bpm` average and `186 bpm` max.
- Distance-split HR averaged `169.6 bpm` in the first half and `176.3 bpm` in the second (+6.7 bpm), which shows a modest late rise in aerobic cost.

- Moving time was `56:14` out of `56:18` elapsed (99.9%), which kept stoppage cost negligible.
- The downsampled moving stream shows `3` stop segments and `0.3%` stationary samples, so the run was mostly continuous with a few interruptions.

- Strava logged about `193.0 m` of climbing, with altitude moving between roughly `151.6 m` and `175.4 m`.
- Estimated climbing was `106.4 m` in the first half and `86.6 m` in the second, so most of the climbing landed earlier.
